{{Quote|Brosh, your charric. Set for level two.|General Soontir Fel, to Brosh|<ref name="VotF">''[[Vision of the Future]]''</ref>}}
'''Brosh''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Chiss/Legends|Chiss]] soldier who was stationed at the [[Hand of Thrawn]] fortress on [[Nirauan/Legends|Nirauan]] in [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Vision of the Future]]'' {{Ab|Vision of the Future (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
